summary: Critical frontend failure - React application not mounting to DOM. Complete testing blocked due to blank page on both localhost and public URL.

critical_bugs.issue: React app fails to mount - blank white page displayed
critical_bugs.impact: Complete frontend failure - no UI elements load at all

details.console_errors: No explicit errors in browser console
details.local_vs_public: Both localhost:3000 and public URL affected identically

potential_causes.issue: React 19 compatibility issues with current setup
potential_causes.evidence: Using React 19.0.0 with older craco configuration

potential_causes.issue: Complex craco configuration with custom plugins
potential_causes.evidence: Multiple custom webpack plugins for visual-edits and health-check

potential_causes.issue: JavaScript runtime error preventing React initialization
potential_causes.evidence: Bundle loads but React.StrictMode not rendering

potential_causes.issue: Missing dependencies or build process issues
potential_causes.evidence: Frontend logs show 'compiled successfully' but app doesn't mount

attempted_diagnostics: Checked all component files exist and syntax appears correct
Tested both localhost and public URL with same result
Confirmed all required data files exist (services, team, contact data)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: React application completely failing to mount. Investigate React 19 compatibility issues, simplify craco configuration, check for JavaScript runtime errors preventing app initialization. Consider downgrading React version or simplifying webpack config until basic React mounting works.
success_percentage: Frontend: 0% - Application not loading at all
